arts.ttl: Paul Merson reveals his 'BIGGEST worry' with Ruben Amorim, as Clinton Morrison pinpoints what 'does his head in' about Man United
arts.sum: United shared the points with Ipswich last Sunday, as Amorim's side drew 1-1 away at Portman Road, with goals from Marcus Rashford and Omari Hutchinson.

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba repeats Marcus Rashford move amid Man United return links and next job hints
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford had his professionalism questioned during the international break after flying to the United States on holiday and attending an NBA game in New York

arts.ttl: Chelsea face Man Utd battle for Serie A sensation
arts.sum: Due to Dorgu's past at left-back, Fasano claims that Ruben Amorim has identified the youngster as an ideal option for his left wing-back role. His versatility and reliability have made him an attractive commodity in the market and the likes of Chelsea - the club he grew up supporting - and Tottenham were interested in a summer move only to be put off by Lecce's whopping €35 million price tag.

arts.ttl: Man United icon Sir Alex Ferguson vs Pep Guardiola has clear winner - only one has changed football
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City fans will debate until the end of time who is the better manager but one clear verdict is set to ruffle feathers

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Ruben Amorim 'quickly' makes 32-year-old transfer decision
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is reportedly ready to do away with experienced midfielder Christian Eriksen in the summer of 2025.

arts.ttl: Adidas Manchester United 2025 'Late 2000s' Retro Collection Leaked
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can leak the special Manchester United 2025 retro collection, which features a design inspired by the Adidas kits of the late 2000s and is expected to be released at the end of the 24-25 season.

arts.ttl: 'I'm not entirely convinced' - Paul Merson reveals Ruben Amorim concern for Man United
